message:
feat(beads): implement MockBeadsClient for testing

Add BeadsOperations trait and MockBeadsClient for unit testing code
that depends on beads operations without spawning subprocesses.

Features:
- BeadsOperations trait abstracting beads operations
- MockBeadsClient with in-memory issue store
- Error injection via BeadsErrorKind and ErrorInjection enums
- Pre-population with test issues via with_issues()
- test_issue() helper for creating minimal test fixtures
- Full filtering support (status, type, assignee, labels, priority, limit)
- Implements all BeadsOperations: list, ready, show, create, update, close
- BeadsClient implements BeadsOperations trait

Tests: 46 new tests covering all mock functionality

Bead: meta_skill-nse8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
